title: Thermal's Delight
description: This mod integrates "Farmer's Delight" with "Thermal Cultivation" to offer players a balanced experience.
body:
This mod integrates Farmer's Delight with Thermal Cultivation to offer players a balanced experience when using both mods.
It allows for the dishes, jelly and peanut butter from Thermal Cultivation to be cooked with the cooking pot from Farmer's Delight.

If Crate Delight is also installed, there will be some extra pressing recipes as well.
